input_file_type: PDF with charts/tables on cited pages (e.g., In-Gold-We-Trust 2026 — 42 tables across 64 pages)
task: Extract findings whose evidence comes from chart/table pages, with citations
failure_pattern: Skill emits citations in text-citation format [file, page, section, quote] for claims whose source is a chart/table page, instead of using the table/chart format [file, page, table_id/chart_id, ...]. table_id is never propagated from extract.py output into the citation.
expected_behavior: When the cited page has a parser-detected table/chart AND the claim references a number/range from that visual, the citation uses the table format with table_id (or chart_id for charts). If parse is uncertain, still uses table format + note 'uncertain parse'.
must_not_happen: A claim sourced from a chart/table page cited as [file, page, section, quote] with no table_id/chart_id field.
skill_rule: references/policies.md#citation 'Khi nào dùng format bảng (trigger)' + references/parsers.md 'Bắt buộc truyền table_id vào citation candidate'
skill_self_check: SKILL.md self-check: 'Claim từ bảng -> dùng format [file, page, table_id, row/col]'
